5.0.short_description: List the energies of a contact model used by the contact

keywords.description: List the energies of a contact model used by the contact

keywords.description: List the energies available in each contact model

keywords.description: List the contact force in the global coordinate system

keywords.description: List all available contact models, their available methods, and the names of the method arguments

keywords.name: contact.list.modellist
keywords.description: List all available contact models, whether or not they have been loaded as plug-in contact models, and their property names

keywords.name: contact.list.moment
keywords.description: List the contact moments in the global coordinate system

keywords.name: contact.list.normal
keywords.description: List the contact normal direction, pointing from the end1 piece to the end2 piece
